relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The disciples admire the temple buildings as Jesus departs.
He says the visible structure will not remain untouched.
On the Mount of Olives, they ask about timing, presence, and the age’s completion.
The first command is not to be led astray.
Many false claims will come in his name.
Conflict reports are not yet the end.
Nations, famine, and earth-shaking mark the pressure of history.
These are birth-pains, not meaningless chaos.
The name will bring pressure and hatred.
Many will stumble and betray one another.
False prophets multiply confusion.
As lawlessness grows, love can become cold.
Endurance is the path through.
The good message of the reign becomes testimony to the nations.
Daniel’s desolating sign calls for understanding.
Those in Judea must flee.
There is no time to cling to possessions.
The field worker must not turn back.
The vulnerable are named with grief.
Prayer attends even the timing of flight.
A great pressure is named.
The days are shortened for the chosen.
Do not trust every claim of Messiah’s location.
Signs and wonders can still mislead.
Jesus tells them beforehand.
Do not chase hidden-room or wilderness rumors.
The Son of Humanity’s presence will be unmistakable like lightning.
The gathering reveals where death has appeared.
Cosmic imagery marks the shaking of an order.
The Son of Humanity appears with clouds, power, and glory.
The chosen are gathered from the four winds.
The fig tree teaches discernment of nearness.
Signs indicate the door is near.
This generation is placed inside the crisis.
His words outlast heaven-and-earth structures.
The day and hour belong to the Father alone.
Noah’s days become the pattern for unpreparedness.
Ordinary life continued until the flood.
They did not know until the moment arrived.
One is taken and one is left in the field.
One is taken and one is left at the mill.
Watchfulness is the faithful posture.
The householder image teaches readiness.
The Son of Humanity comes at an unexpected hour.
The faithful servant feeds the household in season.
Blessed is the servant found doing the work.
Faithfulness is entrusted with more.
Delay can expose the heart.
The harmful servant turns delay into abuse.
The lord arrives unexpectedly.
Hypocrisy receives its portion in warning imagery.
